title: BEM-717 event fixture
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/tests/autonomy/event_e2e','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 10:53 (UTC+3)'
script=Path('scripts/autoprocess_claude_mailbox_response.py')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-mailbox-autoprocess.yml')
fixture=Path('governance/tests/autonomy/event_e2e/bem717_fixture.md')
fixture.write_text('# BEM-717 | SYNTHETIC EVENT FIXTURE'+sep+'BEM-703 | CLAUDE REVIEW | MULTI-AGENT STRATEGY v2.1'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+'This fixture verifies parser and output contract only.'+sep)
text=fixture.read_text(errors='ignore')
up=text.upper()
decision='MESSAGE'
if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
elif 'APPROVED' in up: decision='APPROVED'
checks=[
 {'name':'script_exists','pass':script.exists(),'evidence':str(script)},
 {'name':'workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'workflow_push_trigger','pass':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/**' in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'workflow_no_schedule','pass':'schedule:' not in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'decision_fixture_approved','pass':decision=='APPROVED','evidence':decision},
 {'name':'script_handles_approved','pass':'APPROVED' in script.read_text(errors='ignore') and 'multi_agent_strategy_v2_1_approved_by_claude.md' in script.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(script)},
 {'name':'operator_none','pass':'operator_role' in script.read_text(errors='ignore') and 'none' in script.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(script)},
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='event_autoprocess_fixture_pass' if not failed else 'event_autoprocess_fixture_failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'EVENT_AUTOPROCESS_FIXTURE_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'event_autoprocess_fixture_e2e.v1','bem':'BEM-717','status':status,'checks':checks,'decision':decision,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem717_event_autoprocess_fixture_e2e.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem717_event_autoprocess_fixture_e2e.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-717 | Event Autoprocess Fixture E2E | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision fixture: '+decision+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem717_event_autoprocess_fixture_e2e','status':status,'decision':decision,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem717_event_autoprocess_fixture_e2e.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-717 '+status+' decision='+decision+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(fixture),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Validated event-driven Claude mailbox autoprocess workflow and parser contract with isolated APPROVED fixture')
"""
No issue comments.
